task_completion.visual_evidence: A Feature work item titled 'Product Inventory Management' is visible in the Azure DevOps interface.

task_completion.description: Link the two User Stories as children of the Feature
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Product Inventory Management' feature shows the two user stories ('Implement product inventory search with full-text filtering' and 'Design REST API rate limiting and authentication middleware') as child links.

task_completion.description: Establish 'Related' links from two bugs to the search story
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Implement product inventory search with full-text filtering' story shows 'Related' links to the 'Product price calculation returns incorrect values...' and 'Inventory count becomes negative...' bugs.

task_completion.description: Establish a 'Related' link from the API 500 error bug to the rate limiting story
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Design REST API rate limiting and authentication middleware' story shows a 'Related' link to the 'API returns 500 error when filtering products...' bug.

task_completion.description: Create the Elasticsearch child task with Remaining Work
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Task titled 'Set up Elasticsearch index for products' is created as a child of the search story, and its 'Remaining Work' field is set to 8.

task_completion.description: Create the Search API child task with Remaining Work
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Task titled 'Build search API endpoint' is created as a child of the search story, and its 'Remaining Work' field is set to 12.

integrity.description: Agent used the Azure DevOps web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Azure DevOps web GUI in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Links are established in the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: Work item links and hierarchies are visible in the Azure DevOps work item forms, boards, or backlog views, rather than being written in a text editor.
The UI elements, fonts, and layouts of the Azure DevOps interface appear consistent and genuine without signs of Inspect Element manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: TailwindTraders. The actual work item titles in the system are longer than described in the prompt. Stories: 'Implement product inventory search with full-text filtering' and 'Design REST API rate limiting and authentication middleware'. Bugs: 'Product price calculation returns incorrect values for bulk discount tiers', 'Inventory count becomes negative after concurrent stock deduction requests', and 'API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name'. The Feature 'Product Inventory Management' and the two Tasks are newly created by the agent.
